title: Enhancement: Desktop GUI Launch on Login / Autostart Integration
body: Implements automated start-on-login capabilities for the desktop system tray GUI wrapper wrapper on macOS, Windows, and Linux. Provides subcommands for direct CLI setup and a toggle item directly in the tray menu.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #1: Implement GUI Autostart Services in service_installer.go
issues.body: Define InstallGUIService, isLaunchOnLoginEnabled, and disableLaunchOnLogin in service_installer.go for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #2: Expose install-gui-service and uninstall-gui-service subcommands in main.go
issues.body: Expose commands to register or deregister the autostart items via lfr-tunnel CLI.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #3: Add Launch on Login toggle item inside System Tray Menu in gui.go
issues.body: Add checkmarked toggle menu option in the GUI system tray for interactive autostart configuration.
